introduction: The goal of proposed virtual laboratories is to achieve a conceptual understanding of standard protocols and tools in biotechnology and biomedical engineering at an advanced level that may be useful in interdisciplinary fields of science and technology.

experiments.name: Basic machine learning using the WEKA tool
Browsing genetic variation databases such as dbSNP, CLIN Var
Conversion of sequence from one database format to another using file format converter
An introduction to Next Generation Sequencing (NGS)
To find out the number of times a sequence is repeated in a given DNA sequence
To analyze the sequence of a given DNA and find out sequence composition

objective: The student with the knowledge of the basic laboratory content (including animation and simulation) can scientifically explain and solve various problems in biotechnology and can tackle new developments and breakthroughs efficiently in science and engineering technology. The labs are being designed to make teaching easier in colleges where teachers coming from interdisciplinary domains can handle the courses to teach visualization and interpretation of bioinformatics-related data sciences with graphical illustrations and usage simplicity. The labs can be extended as a course manual or reference textbook for bioscience students in biology, biotechnology, and microbiology.

courseAlignment.description: The syllabi of this lab align to the following universities in India.
universities: Visvesvaraya Technological University Karnataka; Bioinformatics; B.Tech Biotechnology
Bharathiyar University Tamil Nadu; Introduction to Bioinformatics; BSc Biotechnology
BIO 3161: Bioinformatics Lab Manipal University B.Tech In Biotechnology
